docs.title: NotebookPlaylink
docs.text:
This package is meant to render Youtube tutorial videos and reference site into the Colab or Jupyter notebooks for easy reference in future.

  • PYPI link for this package - NotebookPlaylink

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
installation steps

First let's do an easy pip installation of the library by running the following command - bash pip install NotebookPlaylink

docs.title: Short example
docs.text:
from NotebookPlaylink.youtube import render_youtube_video

URL = "https://www.youtube.com/live/h25pePMdoPA?si=B0v6zKKtX2S92D7-"
render_youtube_video(URL=URL, width=780, height=480)

docs.title: Arguments
docs.text: Args Type Description URL str input URL of a YouTube video as a string height int height of the video to display in Jupyter notebook, defaults to 480 width int width of the video to display in Jupyter notebook, defaults to 780

docs.title: Returns
docs.text: Returns Type Description Response str "success" or InvalidURLException

docs.title: Short example
docs.text:
from NotebookPlaylink.site import render_site

URL = "http://pytorch.org/"
render_site(URL=URL, width="90%", height="500")

docs.title: Arguments
docs.text: Args Type Description URL str input URL of a website as a string height str height of the website to display in Jupyter notebook, defaults to "600" width str width of the website to display in Jupyter notebook, defaults to "100%"

docs.title: Returns
docs.text: Returns Type Description Response str "success" or InvalidURLException
